confirmed.note: feat #2488 added the same ~22-line ConnectedStationsDialog build block (RadioMeta meta + sdClients loop building ConnectedStationsDialog::Client + dialog.exec + selectedHandle) verbatim into BOTH confirmClientSlotAvailability overloads in one commit (2x 'ConnectedStationsDialog::Client sc;', 2x 'sdClients.append(sc);'); differs only by the gate condition (multiFlexEnabled vs licensedClients<=1)

feat #796 added the AetherDspDialog raise-or-create + ~25 connect(dlg,&AetherDspDialog::nrXChanged,...QMetaObject::invokeMethod(m_audio,...setNrX)) signal-wiring block 3 times in one commit (3x 'new AetherDspDialog', 3x nr4ReductionChanged, 44 added invokeMethod(m_audio,...) lines); later a 4th copy was layered on

feat #3176 duplicated the existing per-scope QVariant->QJsonValue token serializer (QString/Int/Double/Bool/gradMetaId ThemeGradient->QJsonObject linear/radial-gradient + stops) into a new global m_tokens serializer; bodies identical except the iterated container. Original block introduced 030d82d2, second copy is net-new in aedcd11a (1 added 'radial-gradient', 1 added gradMetaId branch)

Channel-Strip PR #2307 created 5 sibling Strip*Panel classes in one commit; saveGeometryToSettings/restoreGeometryFromSettings + closeEvent/moveEvent/resizeEvent/showEvent/hideEvent block is copy-pasted across all siblings, edited only by class name and the '<Panel>Geometry' settings key string (partial-edited siblings)

false_positives.what_happened: Two copies of the RBJ Audio-EQ-Cookbook biquad-coefficient computation (Peak/LowShelf/HighShelf cases: b0=1+alpha*A, twoSqrtAalpha=2*sqrtA*alpha, etc.). One is the design-time coefficient path, the other the cached-runtime path. The line/token detector sees ~20 identical algebraic-assignment lines and flags a chunk clone, but these are a canonical published DSP formula table, not refactorable application logic (extracting it would hurt the audio hot path).
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: add an 'algebraic data-formula' suppressor — when a candidate clone is >=70% lines of the shape 'ident = <arithmetic expr of known math idents (alpha,cosW,sqrtA,A,...)>;' with no calls/branches/side-effects beyond a switch-case skeleton, downweight (treat like a data-table). Equivalently extend the existing data-table heuristic to recognize dense numeric/arithmetic assignment runs, not just brace-init literal arrays.

false_positives.what_happened: Beyond the genuine 3x AetherDspDialog clone (counted as confirmed), the line-window detector ALSO fires on individual runs of the Qt connect(obj,&Sig,this,[this](T v){ QMetaObject::invokeMethod(m_audio,[this,v](){ m_audio->setX(v); }); }); idiom that repeats per-signal within a single wiring site. These per-signal repeats are mechanical Qt signal-slot boilerplate (one line per parameter), not a copied logic chunk.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: detect the connect(...)/QMetaObject::invokeMethod lambda-forwarding idiom and collapse a run of consecutive such statements into a single 'signal-wiring' token before clone matching, so N near-identical one-liner connects don't inflate a window match. More generally, suppress windows whose only varying tokens are a signal name + setter name drawn from the same identifier family.

cycle.evidence: archcheck --graph on HEAD: nodes=607 edges=1447 sccs_total=607 sccs_cyclic=0 largest_scc=1. CORPUS_CHECK_DETAIL also reports циклы=0(SCC<=1). No cyclic SCC to attribute; nothing to archaeology.
